name: @pls4all/wasm
description: WebAssembly bindings for pls4all — portable PLS / NIRS engine.

scripts.stage:wasm: node -e "const fs=require('fs'),p='../../build/emscripten/bindings/js/';fs.mkdirSync('dist',{recursive:true});for(const f of ['p4a.js','p4a.wasm']){if(!fs.existsSync(p+f))throw new Error('missing WASM artifact '+p+f+' — run: cmake --preset emscripten && cmake --build --preset emscripten --target pls4all_wasm');fs.copyFileSync(p+f,'dist/'+f)}console.log('staged p4a.js + p4a.wasm into dist/')"
scripts.prepack: npm run build && npm run stage:wasm
